## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any issue. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new capability
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes locally (lint + typecheck + test)
- [ ] Respects the layer boundaries (see ARCHITECTURE.md)
- [ ] Migration included if the schema changed
- [ ] New env vars added to `.env.example`, `config.py`, and k8s manifests
- [ ] Tests added/updated
